# claude_users (Data Source)

Use this data source to list users in the Claude organization.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `email` (String) Filter users by email address.

### Read-Only

- `users` (Attributes List) The list of users. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Read-Only:

- `added_at` (String) The timestamp when the user was added to the organization.
- `email` (String) The email address of the user.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the user.
- `name` (String) The name of the user.
- `role` (String) The role of the user in the organization.
